message:
fix(e2e): increase max_tokens to sustain GPU load for scale-up (#525)

Increase maxTokens from 150 to 400 to generate longer outputs that
keep the GPU KV cache occupied longer. This helps ensure the saturation
engine detects load and triggers scale-up reliably.

Also increase curl timeout from 120s to 180s to accommodate the longer
response times.

Testing showed that with A100 GPUs, the model responds very quickly
(TTFT ~20ms) with shorter outputs, causing load generation to complete
before metrics are collected. Longer outputs sustain the load and
allow the saturation engine to properly detect and recommend scale-up.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,8 +58,8 @@ const (
 	numLoadWorkers     = 10    // Number of parallel load generation workers
 	requestsPerWorker  = 500   // Requests each worker sends
 	batchSize          = 50    // Concurrent requests per batch
-	curlTimeoutSeconds = 120   // Timeout for each curl request
-	maxTokens          = 150   // Max tokens for completion requests
+	curlTimeoutSeconds = 180   // Timeout for each curl request (increased for longer outputs)
+	maxTokens          = 400   // Max tokens for completion requests (increased to sustain GPU load)
 	batchSleepDuration = "0.1" // Sleep duration between batches to control rate
 )
